title: 7 Chakra Aroma Oil Set
shortDescription: 7 Chakra Aroma Oil Set ek specially blended essential oil collection hai jo body ke saaton energy centers — Muladhara se Sahasrara tak — ko balance aur activate karne ke liye design ki gayi hai. Har oil ek specific chakra ke saath resonate karti hai aur uski vibrational frequency ko align karti hai. Vastu aur aromatherapy dono ke perspective se yeh set meditation, yoga, reiki aur space purification ke liye ideal hai.
description:
7 Chakra Aroma Oil Set

7 Chakra Aroma Oil Set Aroma Oils category ka ek premium product hai jo Vedic chakra vigyan aur modern aromatherapy ko combine karta hai. Hamare body mein saat mukhya energy centers (chakras) hote hain jo hamare physical, emotional aur spiritual health ko directly influence karte hain. Jab in chakras mein blockage aata hai, toh life ke alag-alag areas mein imbalance mahsoos hota hai. Yeh specially formulated aroma oils in blockages ko door karke energy ka smooth flow restore karti hain.

Har oil premium natural botanical extracts, flowers, herbs aur resins se carefully blended ki gayi hai, jo us specific chakra ki elemental aur vibrational frequency se match karti hai. Yeh set vastu-aligned spaces mein use karne par space ki subtle energy ko bhi positively affect karta hai — isliye yeh sirf personal wellness tool nahi, balki ek powerful Vastu remedy bhi hai.

Set Mein Shamil Oils

  • Muladhara (Root Chakra) Oil — Patchouli, Cypress aur Vetiver ka blend. Tailbone ke paas sthit yeh chakra survival, security aur grounding ko control karta hai. Yeh oil stability, fearlessness aur earth connection ko restore karti hai.
  • Swadhisthana (Sacral Chakra) Oil — Ylang Ylang aur Jasmine ka blend. Navel ke neeche sthit yeh chakra creativity, emotions aur sensuality ko govern karta hai. Yeh oil artistic expression, passion aur emotional freedom ko enhance karti hai.
  • Manipura (Solar Plexus Chakra) Oil — Bergamot aur Ginger ka blend. Navel ke upar sthit yeh chakra self-confidence, willpower aur identity se connected hai. Yeh oil personal power, self-worth aur decision-making capacity ko strengthen karti hai.
  • Anahata (Heart Chakra) Oil — Sandalwood aur Rose ka blend. Chest center mein sthit yeh chakra love, compassion aur emotional healing se juda hai. Yeh oil relationships ko heal karti hai, grief ko release karti hai aur unconditional love ko invite karti hai.
  • Vishuddha (Throat Chakra) Oil — Frankincense aur Peppermint ka blend. Throat area mein sthit yeh chakra communication, truth aur self-expression ko control karta hai. Yeh oil bolne ki clarity, sunne ki shakti aur authentic expression ko support karti hai.
  • Ajna (Third Eye Chakra) Oil — Cinnamon aur Sage ka blend. Bhroo ke beech sthit yeh chakra intuition, wisdom aur inner vision se juda hai. Yeh oil impatience aur past burdens ko release karti hai, insight ko sharpen karti hai aur sound sleep promote karti hai.
  • Sahasrara (Crown Chakra) Oil — Frankincense, Sandalwood aur Myrrh ka blend. Sar ke top par sthit yeh chakra spiritual connection, divine consciousness aur enlightenment ka center hai. Yeh oil highest potential ko unlock karti hai aur cosmic alignment promote karti hai.

Key Features

  • 7 Individual Chakra-Specific Blended Oils
  • Natural Botanical Extracts — No Harmful Synthetics
  • Vastu Space Purification mein Upyogi
  • Meditation, Yoga aur Reiki ke liye Ideal
  • Diffuser, Topical Application aur Room Spray ke roop mein Use Karein
  • Sustainably Sourced Aromatic Ingredients

Benefits

  • Saat Chakras ko individually balance aur activate karta hai
  • Emotional aur mental blockages ko clear karne mein sahayak mana jata hai
  • Meditation aur spiritual practices ko deepen karta hai
  • Vastu dosha areas mein space ki vibration ko elevate karta hai
  • Stress, anxiety aur restlessness ko kam karne mein upyogi hai
  • Sleep quality improve karne ke liye use kiya jata hai
  • Self-confidence, creativity aur intuition ko strengthen karta hai
  • Reiki, crystal healing aur sound therapy ke saath combine kiya ja sakta hai

Ideal For

  • Meditation Rooms aur Prayer Spaces
  • Yoga Studios
  • Bedrooms aur Personal Healing Spaces
  • Vastu-Deficient Zones ki Energy Correction
  • Reiki Practitioners aur Energy Healers
  • Anyone Seeking Emotional aur Spiritual Balance

How to Use

Diffuser mein 3-5 drops daalein ya pulse points (temples, wrists, nape of neck) par diluted form mein apply karein. Vastu use ke liye specific directional zone mein diffuse karein ya few drops paani mein mix karke floor mein sprinkle karein. Har chakra oil ko uske corresponding body location ke paas use karne se maximum benefit milta hai.
benefits: 7 Chakras ka Individual Balancing aur Activation
Emotional aur Mental Blockages Release
Meditation aur Spiritual Depth Enhancement
Vastu Space Purification aur Energy Elevation
Stress aur Anxiety Reduction
Sleep Quality Improvement (Ajna Oil)
Self-Confidence aur Willpower Boost (Manipura Oil)
Love aur Relationship Healing (Anahata Oil)
Intuition aur Wisdom Enhancement (Ajna aur Sahasrara Oil)
Reiki, Yoga aur Crystal Healing ke saath Compatible
howToUse: 7 Chakra Aroma Oil Set ko diffuser mein 3-5 drops daalkar ya carrier oil ke saath dilute karke pulse points par apply karke use karein. Vastu purposes ke liye ghar ke specific directional zones mein diffuse karein. Meditation ke doran apne focus chakra ki corresponding oil ko inhale karein ya us area par lightly apply karein. Daily ritual ke roop mein subah ya sone se pehle use karna sabse effective mana jata hai.

title: 9 Planets (Navagraha) Aroma Oil Set
shortDescription: 9 Planets Navagraha Aroma Oil Set ek specialized essential oil collection hai jismein Vedic Jyotish ke nau grahon — Surya, Chandra, Mangal, Budh, Guru, Shukra, Shani, Rahu aur Ketu — ki energy se aligned oils shamil hain. Har oil us planet ke corresponding herbs, flowers aur botanicals se blend ki gayi hai jo Vedic traditions mein us grah ki shakti se judi mani jaati hain. Graha Dosh Shanti, planetary energy balancing aur Vastu space harmonization ke liye use ki jaati hai.
description:
9 Planets Navagraha Aroma Oil Set

9 Planets Navagraha Aroma Oil Set Vedic Jyotish aur Aroma Vastu ka ek unique sangam hai. Vedic astrology ke anusaar hamare jeevan ke har pehlu ko Navagraha — nau cosmic planets — influence karte hain. Surya se shuru hokar Ketu tak, har grah life ke alag aspect ko govern karta hai jaise health, career, relationships, finances, spirituality aur karma. Jab in grahon ki position hamare janam kundali mein weak ya afflicted hoti hai, toh un areas mein challenges aate hain.

Yeh specially formulated aroma oils har grah ki energetic frequency se resonate karti hain aur us planet ke positive influences ko invoke karne mein sahayak mani jaati hain. Vedic traditions mein har grah specific herbs, flowers aur fragrant botanicals se associated hai — jaise Surya ke liye Saffron, Chandra ke liye Jasmine, Shukra ke liye Rose. Yeh oils unhi traditional associations ko modern aromatherapy ke through deliver karti hain. Vastu ke perspective se, har grah ek specific direction ko bhi rule karta hai, isliye yeh oils directional energy balancing ke liye bhi prayukt hoti hain.

Set Mein Shamil Oils

  • Surya (Sun) Oil — Saffron, Cinnamon aur Orange ka blend. Surya soul, vitality aur authority ka karak hai. Yeh oil self-confidence, leadership, recognition aur positive health ke liye use ki jaati hai. Sunday ko ya East zone mein diffuse karna auspicious mana jata hai.
  • Chandra (Moon) Oil — Jasmine aur White Lotus ka blend. Chandra mind, emotions aur intuition ko govern karta hai. Yeh oil mental peace, emotional stability, mother's blessings aur sleep improvement ke liye upyogi hai. Monday ko ya Northeast zone mein use karein.
  • Mangal (Mars) Oil — Red Sandalwood, Cinnamon aur Black Pepper ka blend. Mangal energy, courage aur action ka grah hai. Yeh oil motivation, passion, overcoming fears aur physical vitality ke liye use ki jaati hai. Tuesday ko ya South zone mein diffuse karein.
  • Budh (Mercury) Oil — Champa aur Cardamom ka blend. Budh intellect, communication aur commerce ka grah hai. Yeh oil mental clarity, learning, business acumen aur communication skills ke liye ideal hai. Wednesday ko ya North zone mein use karein.
  • Guru/Brihaspati (Jupiter) Oil — Saffron, Lemon aur Clove ka blend. Guru wisdom, abundance aur expansion ka grah hai. Yeh oil spiritual growth, financial prosperity, education aur blessings ke liye use ki jaati hai. Thursday ko ya Northeast zone mein diffuse karein.
  • Shukra (Venus) Oil — Rose, Geranium aur Ylang Ylang ka blend. Shukra love, beauty, arts aur harmony ka grah hai. Yeh oil relationships, romance, creativity aur material comforts attract karne ke liye use ki jaati hai. Friday ko ya Southeast zone mein use karein.
  • Shani (Saturn) Oil — Cedarwood, Patchouli aur Vetiver ka blend. Shani discipline, karma aur structure ka grah hai. Yeh oil grounding, focus, overcoming obstacles aur karmic clearing ke liye use ki jaati hai. Saturday ko ya West zone mein diffuse karein.
  • Rahu Oil — Eucalyptus, Spearmint aur Neroli ka blend. Rahu ambition, innovation aur illusion ka shadow planet hai. Yeh oil mental fog ko clear karne, confusion se protect karne aur unexpected changes navigate karne ke liye use ki jaati hai. Saturday/Rahu Kaal mein ya Southwest zone mein use karein.
  • Ketu Oil — Camphor, Frankincense aur Vetiver ka blend. Ketu spirituality, detachment aur liberation ka shadow planet hai. Yeh oil spiritual awakening, past life karma release aur inner peace ke liye upyogi hai. Saturday ko ya Northwest zone mein diffuse karein.

Key Features

  • 9 Planet-Specific Blended Essential Oils
  • Vedic Jyotish Traditions par Based Formulation
  • Graha Dosh Shanti ke liye Prayukt
  • Vastu Directional Zone Balancing mein Sahayak
  • Natural Herbs, Flowers aur Botanical Extracts
  • Daily Ritual aur Weekly Planetary Sadhana ke liye Ideal

Benefits

  • Navagraha ki afflicted energies ko balance karne mein sahayak mana jata hai
  • Specific planetary dosh ke effects ko mitigate karne ke liye use kiya jata hai
  • Career, health, relationships aur finances ke specific areas mein positive energy invoke karta hai
  • Vastu directional zones ki planetary energy ko align karta hai
  • Weekly planetary rituals aur sadhana ko empower karta hai
  • Mental clarity aur emotional balance support karta hai
  • Spiritual practices aur navagraha puja ko enhance karta hai
  • Graha Shanti homam ke complementary remedy ke roop mein use kiya ja sakta hai

Ideal For

  • Jyotish Remedies aur Graha Shanti Practices
  • Vastu Directional Energy Correction
  • Weekly Planetary Rituals (Surya Puja on Sunday, etc.)
  • Navagraha Mandal aur Puja Spaces
  • Meditation, Mantra Chanting ke saath Use
  • People Facing Specific Planetary Dosh (Shani Sade Sati, Mangal Dosh, etc.)
  • Astrologers aur Vastu Consultants ke Recommendations ke saath

How to Use

Har planet ki oil us planet ke specific weekday par use karna most effective mana jata hai — Surya Sunday ko, Chandra Monday ko, aur isi tarah aage. Diffuser mein 3-5 drops daalein ya puja space mein diffuse karein. Mantra chanting ke saath combine karne par planetary energy invoking aur effective ho jaati hai. Vastu use ke liye us planet ke ruled directional zone mein diffuse karein. Carrier oil ke saath dilute karke topical application bhi ki ja sakti hai.
benefits: Navagraha Energy Balancing — Sab 9 Grahon ka
Graha Dosh aur Planetary Afflictions Mitigation
Career aur Financial Growth (Surya, Guru, Budh Oil)
Emotional Stability aur Mental Clarity (Chandra, Budh Oil)
Relationship aur Love Harmony (Shukra Oil)
Courage aur Vitality Boost (Mangal Oil)
Karmic Clearing aur Discipline Support (Shani Oil)
Mental Fog aur Confusion Se Protection (Rahu Oil)
Spiritual Awakening aur Detachment (Ketu Oil)
Vastu Directional Zone Planetary Alignment
howToUse: 9 Planets Navagraha Aroma Oil Set ko us planet ke weekday par diffuser ya puja space mein use karein. 3-5 drops diffuser mein daalein ya water mein mix karke room mein spray karein. Mantra chanting ke saath combine karna aur bhi effective mana jata hai. Vastu correction ke liye planet-ruled directional zone mein diffuse karein. Carrier oil ke saath dilute karke wrists ya forehead par topical use bhi kar sakte hain.

title: 8 Directional Vastu Aroma Oil Set
shortDescription: 8 Directional Vastu Aroma Oil Set ek unique Aroma Vastu remedy set hai jismein Vastu Shastra ke aath digon — Uttar, Dakshina, Purva, Paschim, Ishaan, Agneya, Nairutya aur Vayavya — ke liye specifically formulated essential oils shamil hain. Har oil us direction ke ruling element, devata aur planetary energy ke saath aligned hai. Yeh set structural Vastu corrections ke bina — sirf aroma ke zariye — directional imbalances ko correct karne ka ek non-invasive aur effective tarika hai.
description:
8 Directional Vastu Aroma Oil Set

8 Directional Vastu Aroma Oil Set Aroma Vastu ki sabse practical aur comprehensive remedy kits mein se ek hai. Vastu Shastra ke anusaar hamare ghar aur office ke aath digo mein alag-alag cosmic energies, elements, devatas aur planetary forces operate karte hain. In digo ka imbalance — chahe construction dosha ki wajah se ho, galat placement ki wajah se ho, ya negative energy accumulation ki wajah se ho — ghar ke rehne walon ki health, wealth, relationships aur mental state ko directly affect karta hai.

Aroma Vastu ek aisaa system hai jismein specific essential oils ko unki vibrational frequency aur elemental correspondence ke basis par specific directional zones mein use kiya jata hai. Jab in oils ko diffuse kiya jata hai, toh yeh us direction ki elemental energy ke saath resonate karti hain, stagnant ya negative energy ko disperse karti hain, aur positive cosmic forces ko attract karti hain. Yeh approach un logon ke liye ideal hai jo ghar ka structural renovation nahi kar sakte ya kisi bhi property mein immediate aur non-invasive Vastu correction chahte hain.

Set Mein Shamil Oils aur Unka Vastu Significance

  • Uttar (North) — Kubera Zone Oil — Mint aur Eucalyptus ka blend. Uttar disha Kubera (wealth deity) aur Mercury grah se associated hai. Yeh Water element zone career luck, financial flow aur mental alertness ko govern karta hai. Mint aur Eucalyptus ki refreshing aur purifying aroma north zone ki water energy ko activate karti hai, career obstacles door karti hai aur prosperity attract karti hai.
  • Dakshina (South) — Yama Zone Oil — Camphor aur Loban (Frankincense) ka blend. South disha Mars se ruled hai aur ise carefully balance karna padta hai. Camphor aur Frankincense ki protective aura yahan ki negative energies ko neutralize karti hai, protection provide karti hai aur south zone ke aggressive element ko shant karti hai. Yeh zone fame aur social recognition se bhi linked hai.
  • Purva (East) — Surya Zone Oil — Lemongrass aur Orange ka blend. East disha Sun se ruled hai aur health, vitality aur new beginnings ka source hai. Orange aur Lemongrass ki bright, uplifting aroma sun energy ko amplify karti hai, fresh positive prana invite karti hai aur ghar mein health aur prosperity ka flow enhance karti hai. Subah ke rituals ke liye yeh oil use karna especially effective mana jata hai.
  • Paschim (West) — Varuna Zone Oil — Jasmine aur Rose ka blend. West disha Saturn aur Varuna devata se associated hai. Yeh creativity, relationships aur gains ka zone hai. Jasmine aur Rose ki floral aroma west zone mein relationship harmony, creative expression aur material gains ko support karti hai aur Saturn energy ko constructive direction mein channel karti hai.
  • Ishaan (Northeast) — Dev Zone Oil — Sandalwood aur Frankincense ka blend. Northeast sabse sacred aur auspicious direction hai jo Water element aur spiritual energies se associated hai. Yeh zone meditation, wisdom aur divine blessings ka gateway hai. Sandalwood ki high-vibrational, meditative aroma northeast ki spiritual energy ko intensify karti hai, prosperity aur wisdom ko invite karti hai aur prayer spaces ko consecrate karti hai.
  • Agneya (Southeast) — Agni Zone Oil — Rose aur Geranium ka blend. Southeast fire element aur Venus grah ka zone hai. Yeh zone ghar ki financial health, kitchen energy aur passion ko govern karta hai. Rose aur Geranium ki warm floral aroma fire element ko balance karti hai, financial worries ko reduce karti hai aur relationships mein passion aur harmony ko invoke karti hai.
  • Nairutya (Southwest) — Earth Zone Oil — Sandalwood aur Vetiver ka blend. Southwest earth element ka zone hai jo stability, relationships aur family health ko control karta hai. Yeh direction Rahu se governed mani jaati hai aur ghar ke strongest aur heaviest zone ke roop mein jana jata hai. Sandalwood aur Vetiver ki deep, grounding aroma southwest zone ki earth energy ko strengthen karti hai, relationships mein stability laati hai aur family bonds ko secure karti hai.
  • Vayavya (Northwest) — Vayu Zone Oil — Lavender aur Peppermint ka blend. Northwest air element ka zone hai jo support systems, helpful people aur social connections ko govern karta hai. Yeh zone Moon se associated hai. Lavender ki calming aur Peppermint ki energizing aroma northwest ki air energy ko balance karti hai, helpful relationships aur social connections attract karti hai aur ghar mein communication ko improve karti hai.

Key Features

  • 8 Direction-Specific Formulated Essential Oils
  • Vastu Elements (Pancha Bhuta) ke saath Aligned
  • Non-Invasive Vastu Dosh Correction
  • Structural Changes ke Bina Space Energy Balancing
  • Natural Botanical aur Floral Extracts
  • Homes, Offices, Retail Spaces, Factories ke liye Suitable
  • Vastu Consultant Guidance ke saath bhi Use Kiya Ja Sakta Hai

Benefits

  • Aath Digo ki Elemental Energy ko Balance karne mein sahayak mana jata hai
  • Structural Vastu dosha ke liye non-invasive aroma remedy ke roop mein prayukt hota hai
  • Ghar ya office ke specific problem zones ki energy correct karta hai
  • Financial zone (North aur Southeast) ko activate karne ke liye use kiya jata hai
  • Relationship aur family harmony (Southwest aur West) ko strengthen karta hai
  • Spiritual aur meditation zone (Northeast) ko energize karta hai
  • Protection aur stability (South aur Southwest) ke liye upyogi hai
  • Space ki overall positive vibration ko elevate karta hai
  • Ghar mein rehne walon ke mood aur well-being ko positively affect karta hai

Ideal For

  • Homes aur Apartments Jahan Structural Vastu Changes Possible Nahi
  • Commercial Offices aur Retail Spaces
  • Properties with Known Vastu Dosh in Specific Directions
  • Vastu Consultants aur Practitioners ke Toolkit mein
  • Regular Vastu Maintenance aur Space Cleansing
  • New Properties Mein Energy Setting ke liye
  • Industrial Units aur Factories

How to Use

Har oil ko apne respective directional zone mein use karein — jaise North zone mein Kubera/Mint oil diffuse karein, Northeast mein Sandalwood oil, Southeast mein Rose/Geranium oil, aur isi tarah. Diffuser ya aroma lamp mein 4-6 drops daalein aur us direction ke room ya corner mein rakhein. Alternative method: Few drops ko water mein mix karke spray bottle mein fill karein aur targeted zone mein spray karein. Vastu consultant ki guidance ke anusaar problematic zones mein regular use karna recommended hai. Morning ya evening rituals ke doran use karna most effective mana jata hai.
benefits: 8 Digo Ki Elemental aur Planetary Energy Balancing
Non-Invasive Vastu Dosh Correction — Bina Todphod ke
Financial Zone Activation (North — Kubera, Southeast — Agni)
Relationship aur Family Stability (Southwest — Earth Zone)
Spiritual aur Meditation Zone Enhancement (Northeast — Ishaan)
Protection aur Negative Energy Neutralization (South, Southwest)
Career aur Social Connection Support (North, Northwest)
Health aur Vitality Boost (East — Sun Zone)
Space Ki Overall Positive Vibration Elevation
Homes, Offices aur Commercial Spaces Ke Liye Suitable
howToUse: 8 Directional Vastu Aroma Oil Set ka use karne ke liye pehle apne ghar ya office ki compass directions identify karein. Phir har oil ko uske respective directional zone mein diffuser ya aroma lamp mein 4-6 drops daalkar use karein. Problem zones mein water spray method bhi effective hai — few drops paani mein mix karke spray karein. Regular use (daily ya weekly) Vastu correction ke liye aur maintain karne ke liye recommended hai. Vastu consultant ki advice ke saath use karna aur bhi targeted aur effective results deta hai.
